First Astrological Classic

Concise Version of the Authentic Bhrigu Samhita
with
Laghu Parashari Principles

Author
Jyotish Bhushan
Lakshmi Narayan Sharma
M.A. (Geography), B.Ed., S.R.H.

The book in your hand is a simplified version of the original Bhrigu Samhita. The
original volume is an astrological classic written by Maharishi Bhrigu thousands of
years ago during the Vedic Period in a tone, manner and language with which the
present day readers arc not familiar with. While the theme and substance remains
unchanged, the vo cabulary and sentence structure h as been si mplified in this book
for everyone to understand easily.
We are aware that the man, by nature, is very inquisitive to know what the future has
in store for him. The contents in Bhrigu Samhita satisfy that urge. It is a compilation
of results based on predictive astrology to help average people cope with the
pressures of life by learning how to become morally and spiritually strong and also
the path they should to follow in their daily lives. Prepared from about five lakh
horoscopes of different people, Maharshi Bhrigu made predictions of their current
and future lives as well as the past. Each of these horoscopes was based upon the
planetary positions of the Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, and
Rahu (North Node of the Moon) and Ketu (South Node of the Moon).
Readers of the b ook w ill be abl e t o understand the meaning and importance of the
terms used in astrology, such as Birth chart, Horoscope, House, Zodiac, Rashi, Stars
in motion. Sun, Planetary movements etc.., in their everyday life. They will be able
to cast a birth chart, create a horoscope, study the ascendance, beneficial and
malefic influence of planetary movements and make predictions. The book has 25
chapters based on 'Laghu Parashari' principles and written in the form of 42
Shlokas that describe basic rules, effects of planetary positions and their influence
on a human being.
The original Bhrigu Samhita was written essentially for those well versed with
astrology, this book has been simplifie d to help common people understand how to
read a horoscope or make predictions.
Mr. Lakshmi Narayan Sharma was born in Alwar (Rajasthan). From his childhood
he displayed great interest towards religion, spirituality and astrology. He spent
over three decades serving th e E ducation Department of Haryana and retired as a
district level gazetted officer. For his contribution to social services, he was
honoured by the Governor of Haryana. He was the Editor of “Jansankhya Shiksha”
a departmental magazine of the Education Department, Haryana. The present book
“Bhrigu Samhita” is his fifth piece of work on Astrology.

To My Parents
Late Sh. CHHAJU RAM & Smt. RAM DEVI

wider cosmos around him. The stars and planets have a sense of wonder. Man’s
quest for knowing the world around is the science of Astrology, the study of patterns
and relationships of planets and stars in motion and its consequent impact and

SECTION - A
AN INTRODUCTION

Maharishi Bhrigu and
Existence of Bhrigu Samhita
Who was Maharishi Bhrigu?

Maharishi Bhrigu was one of the seven great sages, the Saptarshis, (one of the Prajapatis, the
HCEKNKVCVQTU QH VJG %TGCVKQP OCFG D[ $TCJOC VJG )QF QH %TGCVKQP  *G YCU VJG ſTUV EQORKNGT QH
predictive astrology, and was the author of Bhrigu Samhita, an astrological classic. Bhrigu
is considered as a Manasa Putra, mind-born son of Lord Brahma, his caste name,
Bhargava Brahmins.
/CJCTKUJK $JTKIW YCU OCTTKGF VQ -J[CVK VJG FCWIJVGT QH 2TCLCRCVK &CMUJC
He had two sons by her, named Dhata and Vidhata. His daughter Sri or Bhargavi,
married to Vishnu. Maharishi Bhrigu had one more son by Kavyamata, who is
known as Shukra, the learned sage and GuruQHVJG#UWTCU6JGUCIG%J[CXCPC
is also said to be his son through Puloma. One of his descendants was the sage,
Jamadagni, who was the father of sage, Parshurama, who is considered as an
avatar of Vishnu.

Why did Bhrigu write Bhrigu Samhita?

Once many great sages and saints gathered at the bank of the river, Saraswati
VQ RCTVKEKRCVG KP /CJC ;CI[C QTICPK\GF D[ &CMUJC 2TCLCRCVK $JTKIWŏU HCVJGT KP
law. But all of them could not decide which of the Trinity Lord Vishnu, Brahma and
5JKXCKURTGGOKPGPVCPFVQYJQOVJG[UJQWNFQHHGT2TCFJCP2CFC /CUVGT%JCKT 
QH VJG ;CI[C 9KVJ VJG EQPUGPUWU QH CNN KV YCU FGEKFGF VJCV /CJCTKUJK $JTKIW
would test and decide, the pre-eminenance of the three.
First, Maharishi Bhrigu decided to test Lord Brahma. He went on to see Lord
Brahma in Brahmaloka. On reaching there the Maharishi showed utter disrespect
to Lord Brahma. Lord Brahma got angry and wanted to punish the Maharishi but
Maa Saraswati, the wife of Lord Brahma saved Maharishi from his anger. Maharishi
Bhrigu cursed Lord Brahma that no one would worship Brahma in Kaliyuga. At

reaching there, Nandi stopped him from going inside because, Shiva and Parvati
were sporting fun. Bhrigu cursed that Lord Shiva would be worshipped in the form

Linga is said to be 400 years old.

L 12 J

Then in order to test Lord Vishnu, Maharishi reached the Vaikunth Dhama.
He entered the Dhama without Lord Vishnu's permission and saw that the Lord
was taking rest at that time. Maharishi asked him to wake up but Lord was in deep
sleep. On seeing no reaction from Vishnu, Maharishi hit the Lord on his chest.
.QTF8KUJPWIQVWRCHVGTVJGUVTQMGCPFTGCNK\GFYJCVJCFJCRRGPGF1PTGCNK\KPI
VJCV/CJCTKUJKJCFJKVJKOYKVJJKUHQQV.QTFCUMGFJKOő/CJCTKUJKCTG[QWJWTV!
My chest is strong but your foot is not so strong". On seeing the decorum of Lord
Vishnu, Bhrigu was pleased and declared Him superior amongst the Trideva.
According to Hindu theology, the goddess of prosperity and wife of Lord
Vishnu, Maha Lakshmi also witnessed the whole incident in the Vaikunth Dhama.
She could not tolerate disrespect showed by Maharishi Bhrigu towards Lord
Vishnu and cursed him that henceforth she would never visit Brahmins and they
will all live in absence of wealth.

What is Bhrigu Samhita?

After the incidence of curse, Maharishi Bhrigu decided to write his famous book
of astrology, the Bhrigu Samhita, to help Brahmins earn their living. Maharishi
Bhrigu collected birth charts, wrote the whole life predictions and compiled them

million horoscopes, in which Maharishi wrote down the fate of every human being
in the universe. Maharishi Bhrigu is known as the “Father of Hindu Astrology” who
CWVJQTGFVJGſTUVCUVTQNQIKECNENCUUKE$JTKIW5COJKVC+VKUDGNKGXGFVJCVQPN[CDQWV
hundredth of these horoscopes have survived to this age. During foreign invasion,
$TCJOKPU UECVVGTGF CNN QXGT +PFKC CPF GCEJ QH VJGO VQQM UQOG RCTVU QH $JTKIW
Samhita. The invaders also captured this asset of Brahmins. The worst of it was
the destruction of Nalanda University Library, where original Bhrigu Samhita was

SECTION - B
BASIC INFORMATION

Panchang and
Its Five Limbs
What is Panchang (Almanac)?
A Panchang is a Hindu calendar and almanac, which follows traditional units of
+PFKCPVKOGMGGRKPICPFRTGUGPVUKORQTVCPVFCVGUCPFVJGKTECNEWNCVKQPUKPCVCDWNCT
form. Accuracy of attributes depending upon the Moon's motions is considered
most crucial for reliability of the panchang, because the Moon is the fastest moving
COQPI CNN JGCXGPN[ GPVKVKGU UJQYP KP VTCFKVKQPCN RCPEJCPIU +VU CNN NKODU YJKEJ
CTG ſXG KP PWODGT KG 6KVJK 8CTC 0CMUJCVTC ;QIC CPF -CTPC FGRGPF WRQP
Moon's motions. The word 'Panchang' or 'Panchangam' is a Sanskrit word, literally
OGCPKPIJCXKPIſXGNKODU+HVJGUGſXGNKODUQTCVVTKDWVGUFGRGPFKPIWRQP/QQP
are accurate, an almanac is considered reliable, because other elements are not

L 16 J

NOTE
Thus there are two Pakshas (Fortnights). From Pratipada to Chaturdashi in both
the Pakshas (Fortnights) lords are same but the lord of Poornima is Chandra,
the libral and the lord of Amavasya is Pittar, the forefatherly. These two Pakshas
(Fortnights) make a Chandra Maas (Lunar month) and two Lunar months make a
Ritu Season. The person, who takes birth in one of the Pakshas (Fortnights), or
one of the twelve Lunar months (Chandra Maas), or one of the six Ritus (Seasons)
bears the following qualities. Read them carefully.
Births in Fortnights
1. Shukal Paksha: Renowned, generous but weak, disputesome, father of
an intelligent and virtueous son.
2. Krishan Paksha: Always happy, gentle, handsome, benevolent, pleased
with wife and obedient son.
Birth in Lunar Months
1. Chaitra: 6TWVJHWNKPVGNNKIGPVIGPGTQWUUYGCVGCVGTJCRR[TQ[CNQHſEGT
and minister.
2. Vaisakh: Handsome, meritorius, wise, virtueous, courageous, passionate,
devotee of Brahmins and God.
3. Jyeshtha: Tall, of changing mind, forgiving nature and foreigner.
4. Aashad: Truthful, obedient, respects teachers, pleasure seeking, reticent
and expensive.
5. Shravan:%QWIJCPFCKT[PCVWTGJCUHTKGPFUUQPUCPFITCPFUQPU
6. Bhadrapad: Normal physique, cough nature, pleased with wife and son
shares happiness and worries.
7. Aashvin: Learned, wealthy, virtueous, popular, income from government,
and love horses.
8. Kartik: Truthful, curly hairs, wealthy, brave and a businessman.
9. Margshirsh: #NYC[UVTWVJHWNMPQYNGFIGCDNGIGPGTQWUGHſEKGPVRKNITKO
and theist.
10. Paush: Occultist, anxious and no wealth from father.
11. Magh: +PVGNNKIGPV MPQYNGFIGCDNG YKPU QXGT GPGOKGU QRRQTVWPKUV CPF
chemist.
12. Falgun: 9GCNVJ[YKUGGHſEKGPVCPFFCPEGURGEKCNKUV

L 17 J

NOTE
The names are kept on the basis of seven planets. They are Sun (Surya), Moon
(Chandra), Mars (Mangal), Mercury (Budh), Jupiter (Guru), Venus (Shukra),
Saturn (Shani). According to the orbit height, the series of planets is 1. Shani
(Saturn), 2. Guru (Jupiter), 3. Mangal (Mars), 4. Ravi (Sun), 5. Shukra (Venus), 6.
Budh (Mercury) and 7. Chandra (Moon).
Horas in a Vara (Week Day)

words “aho” and “ratra” meaning “day” and “night” respectively. Thus 'hora' also
means the most primary two-fold division of time on the basis of the day and night.
This takes into account not only the time frames but also the quality of time like the
day is dominated or ruled by the Sun and the night by the Moon. This word also

Sun and Moon. Thus, the word HORA broadly describes the quantity and quality of

Effects of Constellations at Birth
1. Ashwini: Beautiful, healthy, happy, simple living, high thinking, intelligent,
clever, successful, wealthy, popular, liked by all.
2. Bharni:*GCNVJ[VTWVJHWNDCNCPEGFNGCTPGFYGCNVJ[HCVCNKUVUGNſUJXKQNGPV
always gloomy and unhappy.

in high circles, famous, fond of rich food, lustful, hopeful, miser, deceitful.
4. Rohini: Tall and thin, balanced mind, good eyesight, soft-spoken, truthful,
charitable, evil-minded, sarcastic nature.
5. Mrigshira: Good natured, good talker, easy-going, happy, wealthy, proud,
feeling inferiority complex and sickly.
6. Ardra: *GCNVJ[ IGPVNG TGNKIKQWU RQYGTHWN UGNſUJ OGCP WPITCVGHWN UJQTV

popular, have children, like a saint, short tempered.

What is a Sign of Zodiac and/or a Rising Sign?

sign is the base value and face value of a birth chart. A Rising sign means the
Ascendant sign (Lagna sign). Our Zodiac is constantly moving and all the twelve
UKIPUIGVCPQRRQTVWPKV[VQTKUGVQDGCPCUEGPFCPVVKNNJQWTUEQORTKUKPICFC[
Generally, the duration of an Ascendant sign is two hours. Ascendant sign can
also be Moon sign (Janam Rashi), if Moon occupies Ascendant sign (lagna rashi).
Moon sign (Janam Rashi) means the sign, in which Moon is posited at the time of

as Janam lagna (Ascendant) in a birth chart. The effects of the signs, in which

be taken together, while predicting one’s birth chart.

years in life of a person born in Aries ascendant or lagna are as under:
Physical appearance
Persons born under Rising sign Aries (Mesh lagna) are of medium stature. They
possess a lean and muscular body. They are neither stout nor thick. They have
ruddy complexion, broad head and narrow chin, fair long face and neck, curly
rough hair, round eyebrows and sharp eyesight. They may have a mark or scar on
their head or forehead.
Personality traits
Mars, the planet of passions and anger, rules this sign Aries (Mesh). So the persons

Physical appearance
Persons with Taurus ascendant (Vrishabh lagna) are of medium stature and plump
body. They have square built solid body with broad forehead, neck thick and stout,
eyes and ears bright and large, hair dark, short and broad plump hands. Their
complexion is very clear. They have strong stoop shoulders and muscles well
developed.

manner. They wait for the opportunity to come and then take full advantage of it.

years in life of a person born in Virgo ascendant or lagna are as under:
Physical appearance
Persons with Virgo ascendant (Kanya lagna) are tall with a slender body. They are
moderately plump with oval face and dark hair. Their eyebrows are curved with
hair growth. Their voice is very often thin and sometimes even shrill. They walk
quickly and they seldom have a potbelly. They are very active and energetic. They
often appear younger than their actual age.
Personality traits
Virgo sign (Kanya rashi) is ruled by Mercury, which is an inconstant planet, so
such persons are fond of quick changes. However, they are very conscientious
and very capable of handling work even in unfavourable situations. They are fast
moving. They are thorough and methodical, practical and discriminative but they
lack will power.
Virgo is an earthy sign, so they have desire to save money. They have sound

Rising Sign Pisces (Meen lagna)
Pisces (Meen lagna)

6JG 2KUEGU KU VJG VYGNHVJ CPF NCUV UKIP QH \QFKCE +V EQPUKUVU QH  RCFC QH 2QQTXC

[QWTVGPFGPE[EQPUVCPVN[RWNNGFD[VJGVKFGUQHGOQVKQPUCPFUKIPKſGU[QWTCDKNKV[VQ
EQPPGEVVJGOUVTQPIN[+VU.QTFKU,WRKVGT+VU/QQN/CPVTCKU“Om kleem Udhrataya
7FFJCTKPG 0COCJŒ +VU 5WDJ 4CVCP )GO  KU ;GNNQY 5CRRJKTG 2GGV 2WMJTCL 
2J[UKECN CRRGCTCPEG RGTUQPCNKV[ VTCKVU RTQHGUUKQPQEEWRCVKQP CPF NWEM[WPNWEM[
years in life of a person born in Pisces ascendant or lagna are as under:
Physical appearance
Pisces ascendant (Meen lagna) persons are generally short in stature and short
limbs. They are plump with short hands and feet. They have dark hair. They have
ƀGUJ[HCEGCPFYKFGOQWVJ6JGKTG[GUCTGIQQFNQQMKPI6JGKTEQORNGZKQPKUUGGP
pale, sad and tired. They may be fat in later years.
Personality traits
Pisces is a watery sign ruled by Jupiter. Therefore, the persons are by nature
easy-going, quick learner, philosophical, restless, imaginative, trustful and fond of
romantic life. They are modest and timid and hesitate putting themselves forward.
They are honest, humane and helpful. They are idealistic and always have
ŎHQTIGVCPFHQTIKXGŏURKTKVKPNKHG6JG[CTGKPENKPGFVQDGQXGTCPZKQWUCPFDGEQOG
disheartened, indecisive and lacking in energy. On account of being over liberal
and over generous, they often hamper their own progress. They are very happy,
when they spend their money to help others and on charitable causes.
The married life of persons with Pisces lagna is generally happy but they
JCXGCLGCNQWUPCVWTGCPFDGKPIRGTUQPUQHCFWCNUKIP6JG[CTGCNYC[UFQWDNG
OKPFGF 6JGKT NKHG RCTVPGTU CTG VJWU OQTG ECTGHWN CPF VT[ VQ CFLWUV VJGOUGNXGU
with their changing moods, tastes and fancies, if they want a peaceful and happy
domestic life.
Pisces is a dual sign, so the persons are not steady. They are imaginative in
nature. They may easily change from one profession to another. They can be good
poets, writers and occultists. They can be successful traders dealing in liquids or
import and export business. They are best suited for charitable institutions.
Profession/Occupation
They can become good actors and musicians as Venus is exalted in this sign. They
can also be physicians. They are also successful in naval services, in shipping
organisations, in hospitals or sanatoriums. They can go in politics and become
ministers.
Lucky/Unlucky years in life

VQURGCMQHVJG5WPCUVTCPUKVKPIVJG\QFKCEKPUVGCFQHGCTVJ+VKUXGT[UKORNGVQ
imagine the earth as the centre of observation and all planets revolving around it.
Although in astronomy Sun is the epicentre of the Universe and father of all the
planets and they revolve around the Sun, yet in astrology earth and its inhabitants
living and nonliving are more important, who are always being affected by the
Sun. The same way, Moon being a satellite of the earth and revolving around
earth is given the position of a planet. Moon appears to be going through one sign
TCUJK VQVJGPGZVUKIP TCUJK OCMKPICEKTEWKVQHCDQWVFC[U/QTGQXGT0QTVJ

though they are not the physical bodies. They are the points of intersection of the
apparent lunar and solar orbital path. Rahu is north node (ascending) and Ketu

NOTE

1.

Degrees of different Planets are extremely important. Suppose there are 4
planets such as Venus, Mars, Rahu and Sun in one house of a Zodical Birth
Chart. We need to know, which planet is in the highest degree in that sign/
house. If Mars is having the highest degree in that sign/house, the results
would be quite different from the other like Venus or Rahu or Sun having
lesser degree. Therefore degrees should be noted while analyzing the results.
 When the planets in Zodical Birth Chart move to the other house, they give 25%
results in the moveable house and 75% of the houses in which they are sitting.
 The planets in Zodical Birth Chart, if are Vakri, they give 25% results in the
previous house and 75% of the house, in which they are sitting.
4. 6JG RNCPGVU UKVVKPI KP DGPGſEOCNGſE JQWUGU KP 0CXCPUJ %JCTV CFF UQOG
effect on the house, where the planet is posited in the Zodical Birth Chart.
 6JGRNCPGVUJCXKPI&GITGGUCVVJGVKOGQHDKTVJCTGYGCM
hence lead to poor and bad results. Planets with the Sun in a Zodical Birth Chart
CNUQNGCFVQRQQTCPFDCFTGUWNVU2NCPGVUJCXKPIuVQuFGITGGUNQPIKVWFGU
CTGOQUVRQYGTHWNJGPEGDGUVQYDGPGſEKCNCPFDGVVGTTGUWNVU

Planetary Strength (Graha Bal)

Every planet is most powerful when it is in an exalted position. As and when it
occupies other sign (Rashi), it becomes less powerful. For more details you can
see the Planatery Table. To know the power of a planet the following points are to
KORQTVCPV(KTUVUGGVJGFGITGGQHVJGRNCPGVVQEQPſTOVJGHCEV
(i) Most powerful, when the planet is placed in its Exalted sign.
(ii) More powerful, when it is placed in its Mool Trikon sign.
(iii) Powerful, when it is placed in its Own sign.
KX 9GCMCPFCHƀKEVGFYJGPKVKURNCEGFKPKVU&GDKNKVCVGFUKIP
Planetary Power or strength (Graha Bal) can be divided into six kinds:
(i) Positional Strength (Sthan bal): The planets which are in its an exalted,
own, friendly and mool trikon sign are called Sthan bali. Moon and Venus in
even sign and remaining i.e. Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Saturn, Rahu and
Ketu in odd sign are Sthan bali.
(ii) Directional Strength (Dig bal): Kendras in an Horoscope are called 1st
JQWUG'CUVVJJQWUG0QTVJVJJQWUG9GUVCPFVJJQWUG5QWVJ/GTEWT[
CPF,WRKVGTKPUVJQWUG/QQPCPF8GPWUKPVJJQWUG5CVWTPKPVJJQWUG
and Sun and Mars in 10th house are Dig bali.
(iii) Temporal Strength (Kaal bal): Sun, Mercury and Venus are Kaal bali, when
someone takes birth in day time. Moon, Saturn and Mars are kaal bali, when
someone takes birth in night time. Jupiter is always kaal bali either the day
birth or the night birth.
L 48 J

(iv) Permanent Strength (Naisargik bal): Saturn, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter,
Venus, Moon and Sun are more powerful in series. Mars is more powerful
than Saturn, Mercury than Mars, Jupiter than Mercury, Venus than Jupiter,
Moon than Venus and Sun than Moon. Sun is more powerful.
(v) Motional Strength (Cheshtha bal):(TQO%CRTKEQTPVQ)GOKPKUKIPKPCP[
UKIPKH5WPCPF/QQPCTGRNCEGFVJG[CTGECNNGF%JGUJVJCDCNKCPFKH/CTU

bali.

Planetary State (Graha Awastha)

Mainly there are ten types of planetary positions or states (Graha Awashthas),
which affects human life everyday.
(i) Luminous (Deept): 9JGP C RNCPGV KU UKVVKPI KP CP GZCNVGF UKIP KV KU ECNNGF
its bright (Deept) Awastha. The native gets transport facility, reputation and
wealth. He has children and wins over enemies.
(ii) Healthy (Swastha): 9JGP C RNCPGV KU RNCEGF KP KVU QYP UKIP KV KU ECNNGF KP
its healthy (Swastha) Awastha. The native gets reputation and wealth. He
prospers the family. He has a beautiful wife and good children.
(iii) Happy (Mudit): 9JGP C RNCPGV KU UKVVKPI KP C HTKGPFN[ UKIP KV KU ECNNGF KP KVU
happy (Mudit) Awastha. The native gets transport facility, honour, reputation
and wealth. He has obedient children and wins over the enemies.
(iv) Peaceful (Shant): 9JGP C RNCPGV KU RNCEGF KP C DGPGſE UKIPJQWUG QH C
8CTIC -WPFNK UWEJ CU *QTC &TGUJMCP 5CPVCP %JCVWTVJCPUJ 0CXOCPUJ
Dashmansh, Trishansh etc. kundlis), it is called its favourable (Shant)
Awastha. This is an auspicious period. The native is learned, religious and a
minister.
(v) Powerful (Shakt):9JGPCRNCPGVKU8CMTKKPCUKIPJQWUGKVKUECNNGFKPKVU
RQYGTHWN 5JCMV #YCUVJCKVUVTKMGUQPJGCNVJCPFYGCNVJQHVJGPCVKXG+HKVKU

(vi) Unhappy (Peedit): 6JG URCP QH NKHG QH C RNCPGV KU u FGITGGU 9JGP KV KU
DGVYGGPQuVQuFGITGGQTuVQuVJGPKVKUECNNGF7PJCRR[ 2GGFKV +V

Awastha. This is a troublesome period for the native. He spends much wealth

Birth Chart?
What is a Birth Chart?

A birth chart (Janam Kundli) is a sky map (space chart) which shows the positions
QHRNCPGVUCVVJGVKOGQHCP+PFKXKFWCNŏUDKTVJKPCUSWCTGVTKCPIWNCTEKTEWNCTUJCRG
EJCTVYKVJEQNWOPUECNNGFJQWUGU DJCXCU +VKURTGRCTGFQPVJGDCUKUQHTKUKPI
UKIPQH\QFKCEKPVJGGCUVGTPJQTK\QPRWVVKPIKVKPVJGſTUVJQWUG6JGſTUVJQWUGKU
known as Ascendant (Lagna).

Requirements for casting a Birth Chart?

person.
Exact date of birth
'KVJGT 'PINKUJ %CNGPFCT FCVG VJCV KU UQNCT FCVG QT +PFKCP 2CPEJCPI #NOCPCE 
Tithi that is lunar date is required. The calendar date starts from one midnight
to next midnight, while Panchang Tithi starts from one sunrise to next sunrise.
6JG%CNGPFCTFCVGHTQOOKFPKIJVVQ0QQPKUECNNGF#/CPFHTQO0QQPVQ
Midnight is called P.M.
Exact time of birth
Exact time of birth is the moment when the child is completely severed from
umbilical cord of the mother and becomes a separate entity.

NOTE

The 12 houses can be divided in four groups of Dharam–Artha, Kama and
/QMUJC 6JG UV VJ VJ JQWUGU DGUVQY TGNKIKQWU UGPVKOGPVU VTWVJ OQTCNKV[
EQPUEKQWUPGUU URKTKVWCN MPQYNGFIG YQTUJKRKPI OGFKCVKQP EJCTKV[ UCETKſEG
and lastly faith in God. Hence, these houses are also called Houses of Dharma
(Religion). These should not be treated as kendras, panpharas and apoklims. The
PFVJVJJQWUGU DJCXCU CTGTGNCVGFVQſPCPEKCNOCVVGTUYGCNVJICKPUQT
losses, occupation or profession, dignity, status, name and fame. Hence these
houses are also called Houses of Artha (Wealth). These should not be treated
as panpharas, apoklims and upachyas. The 3rd, 7th, 11th houses (bhavas)
respectively represent desires, passions, sensual pleasures, marital happiness
and all other comforts of life. Hence these houses are also called Houses of
Kama (Pleasure). These should not be treated as kendras, panpharas, apoklims,
upachayas and trishadaya. The remaining 4th, 8th, 12th houses (bhavas) show
motherly love, care and understanding, personal conveyance, residential house,
span of life, divine knowledge and devotion to Almighty God. Hence these houses
are also called Houses of Moksha (Emancipation). These should not be treated as
kendras, panpharas and apoklims.

Names, Karakas and Subjects of Twelve Houses

The 1st house (Tanu bhava)

Nine Planets and their Lordships of Signs/Houses

There are nine planets Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu
CPF-GVW6JG5WPCPF/QQPJCXGVJGNQTFUJKRQHQPGUKIPJQWUGYJKNG/CTU

and Ketu have no lordship over any house. Rahu is called “Shanivat” (like Saturn)
and Ketu “Mangalvat”(like Mars).

FOR PRACTICE

In the same way make another two groups (1) Saturn and Moon (2) Janam Lagna
and Hora Lagna. Work out the longevity. If from all the three groups one and the
same longevity appears, then it is acceptable. If two are same and one differs or
all the three differ, then add all the years and divide by 3 and note the Quotient
(Bhagphal). This will be the age group of the native. It may be long (Dirghayu) or
medium (Madhayu) or short (Alpayu). In such a case Hora lagna may also be quoted.

(xxix) Anubhaya-dharmi (Neutral): The results of such planets during Mahadasha
and Antardasha of their own are neither good nor bad. They give ordinary
results. Read the following shloka.

(ix) Atma-sambandhi are those planets, which are natural friends, both of them
are debilitated, or both of them are exalted, such as Sun-Moon, Sun-Mars,
Sun-Jupiter, Mars and Jupiter, Mercury and Venus, Venus and Saturn are
natural friends. Therefore, they are Atma-sambandhis. Saturn and Venus are
fast friends as Venus is lord of kendra, Saturn is also lord of Kendra, where
Venus is the lord of trine and Saturn is also the lord of trine.

Views about Rahu-Ketu Aspects

The original scriptures of Jyotish written by Maharishi Prashara never talks about
the aspects of Rahu and Ketu since they are blind planets and do not have light.
;QWECPPQVUGGVJGOKPVJGUM[NKMGQVJGTRJ[UKECNDQFKGU*QYGXGT[QWCNUQJCXG
to understand that Prashara Hora Shastra, the written text of original astrology,
KU CP KPEQORNGVG DQQM KP KVUGNH 6JG DQQM KU PQV C OCPWCN HTQO # VQ < +V KU C
code breaking text, which requires higher intuitive powers to comprehend this
divine science. The Maharishi left the book incomplete, because he wanted the
TGUV QH VJG KPHQTOCVKQP YJKEJ YCU LWUV CU XCNWCDNG CU VJG RJ[UKECN YTKVVGP VGZV
to be accessed by a professional. Those individuals practise extensive sadhna
(meditation) and live a “Satwic” (purity and goodness) lifestyle. Such sadhna
GZRQUGF OQTG KPHQTOCVKQP CDQWV ,[QVKUJ NCVGT KP VJG VKOGNKPG QH +PFKC /CJCTKUJK
Bhrigu wrote about the aspects of Rahu and Ketu in “Bhrigu Samitha.”
6JGTGCUQPYJ[VJGVJCPFVJ*QWUGCURGEVJCUDGGPCUUKIPGFVQ4CJW
and Ketu is due to their Karmic effect. Rahu and Ketu show our Karmas of past life
of what we achieved and failed to achieve, and what we are to accomplish in this
NKHGVKOG6JGVJ*QWUGKUVJGJQWUGQHRCUVNKHGFGGFUCPFMCTOCYJKNGVJGVJ
House shows the deeds and karma of this lifetime.
Observation made by the author
9JGP + ſTUV UVCTVGF RTCEVKUKPI 8GFKE CUVTQNQI[ CPF NQQMGF CV RGQRNG U DKTVJ

problems and inaccuracies even during the interpretation of my own horoscope.
1PEG + HQWPF QWV CDQWV 4CJW-GVW VJ CPF VJ CURGEVU HTQO C PQVGYQTVJ[
astrologer, everything was understood and made sense, why certain careers

L 87 J

SECTION - D
ASCENDANT-WISE (LAGNA-WISE)
PREDICTIONS OF PLANETS

Aries

Predictions of 9 Planets in
12 Houses with regard to Aries Ascendant

Aries Ascendant
(Mesh Lagna)
Asc.
1

Aries Ascendant (Mesh Lagna)

The persons born under Rising sign Aries (Mesh lagna) are of medium stature.
They possess a lean and muscular body. They are neither stout nor thick. They
have ruddy complexion, broad head and narrow chin, fair long face and neck, curly
rough hair, round eyebrows and sharp eyesight. They are of wheatish colour. They
may have a mark or scar on their head or forehead and a black mole on face or
chest.

Predictions of 9 Planets in 12 Houses with regard to Aries Ascendant
Predictions of Sun in Aries Ascendant
Sun in the 1st House in Aries

6JGNQTFQHſHVJJQWUG5WPKURQUKVGFKPVJGUVJQWUGQHRJ[UKECNHGCVWTGUJGCNVJ
and personality in the ascendant Aries sign of friendly Mars, its exalted sign. The
native has medium stature. He is healthy, heroic, energetic, forceful, ambitious,
learned, knowledgeable and shrewd. He is eloquent in speech. People like his
speech and respect him. He is happy with his capable children and gets strength
HTQOVJGO6JG5WPCURGEVUVJGVJJQWUGQHNKHGRCTVPGTUGZWCNTGNCVKQPUCPF
business in the Libra sign of inimical Venus, its debilitated sign. His wife is
neither good looking nor does she follow domestic norms. He feels unhappy in
the company of his wife. Relations with wife are adversely affected. He himself
is careless and does not pursue his business well and loses earnings. He leads
a disturbed life.

his brothers and sisters. They do not support him. His maternal grandfather helps
him. He gets victory over enemies. He gains from disputes and court matters.

L 121 J

Taurus

Predictions of 9 Planets in
12 Houses with regard to Taurus Ascendant

Taurus Ascendant
(Vrishabh Lagna)

Asc.


Taurus Ascendant (Vrishabh Lagna)

Taurus ascendant (Vrishabh lagna) persons are of medium stature and plump
body. They have square built solid body with broad forehead, thick neck and stout,
bright and large eyes and ears, dark hair, short and broad plump hands. Their
complexion is very clear. They have strong stoop shoulders and muscles well
developed.

Predictions of 9 Planets in 12 Houses with regard to Taurus Ascendant
Predictions of Sun in Taurus Ascendant
Sun in the 1st House in Taurus

The Sun is posited in the 1st house of physical features, health, and personality in
the ascendant sign Taurus of inimical Venus. The native is not handsome and is
attractive in appearance. He is healthy and courageous. He respects his mother

+VKUVJG6CWTWU#UEGPFCPV 8TKUJCDJNCIPC DKTVJEJCTV+VKUOKNFUQHVUOQQVJCPF
submissive sign. Taureans are practical, reliable, patient, determined and focussed
people. They are tolerant but when they lose their temper, they become angry and
aggressive like a bull. After a short period, they become normal. They are fond of
HWPURNGCUWTGUNQXGDGCWV[CPFOWUKE6JG[CTGCOC\KPIKPEQPVTQNNKPIVJGOUGNXGU
They are obstinate having certain principles in life. The above birth chart belongs to

righteous, dutiful, good-natured, learned, a theist, and a devotee of almighty God.

L 247 J

Virgo

Predictions of 9 Planets in
12 Houses with regard to Virgo Ascendant

Virgo Ascendant
(Kanya Lagna)
Asc.


Virgo Ascendant (Kanya Lagna)

The Persons with Virgo ascendant (Kanya lagna) are tall with a slender body. They
are moderately plump with oval face, dark hair, bright eyes, long nose and thin
lips. Their eyebrows are curved with hair growth. Their voice is very often thin and
sometimes even shrill. They walk quickly and they seldom have a pot belly. They
are very active and energetic. They often appear younger than their actual age.

Predictions of 9 Planets in 12 Houses with regard to Virgo Ascendant
Predictions of Sun in Virgo Ascendant
Sun in the 1st House in Virgo

The Sun is posited in the 1st house of physical features, health and personality in

Scorpio

Predictions of 9 Planets in

Scorpio Ascendant
(Vrishchik Lagna)
Asc.


Scorpio Ascendant (Vrishchik Lagna)

The Scorpio sign (Vrishchik rashi) is the negative sign (rashi) of Mars and
therefore, such persons will manifest different qualities from those of Aries (Mesh),

symbol is a venomous Scorpio. The persons born in Scorpio lagna are well built.
The stature is above average. Face is broad with commanding appearance. They
have thick dark curly hair, long nose, long hands and long feet. They have dusky
complexion and a good personality.

Planetary Conjunctions
(Yutis) and Their Effects

some astrologers or Pandits put Shani ki Sadhesati and Dhaiiya in negative terms,

NOTE

According to present researches and views of learned astrologers Astkoot
/GNCRCMKUDCUGFQPQPN[/QQP.CIPCCPF0CMUJCVTC*GTG$KTVJ.CIPCCPFQVJGT
planets are left out. Astkoot Melapak gives an account of the nature of both the
boy and the girl only and not of the marital bliss. For marital bliss other facts such
as health, children, career, honour, prosperity, peace and happiness must also be
EQPUKFGTGFVJTQWIJ$KTVJ.CIPCCPF0CXOCPUJ.CIPC+HCNNVJGVJTGGNCIPCU$KTVJ

group either Dev group or Danav group, it is very good for marital bliss. Mars is
said to be harmful only in 7th house and not in other houses i.e. 1st, 2nd, 4th, 8th
and 12th houses. Saturn in 7th house speaks two marriages in life and its aspect
QPVJJQWUGUJQYUNCVGOCTTKCIGKPVJGCIGQHCDQWV[GCTU/CTTKCIGCVVJG
time of Shani ki sadhesati or dhaiya also weakens the marital bliss and sometimes
leads to the worst situation of divorce. Jupiter’s presence in 7th house is also one
of the reasons for late marriage. So these facts must be studied along with Astkoot
Melapak for happy long life.

What is Planetary Mantra?

Astrology is a system which shows not only the possibilities of timely happenings
in life but also helps in taking advantage of possitive happenings and neglecting
